info.name: Planner API Copy
info.description:
Complete API collection for testing Planner application with JWT authentication, voyage management, proposals (generation via Gemini AI and saving), expenses, itineraries, flights, locations, images, and travel groups.

Endpoint changes:
- Proposal generation: POST /api/proposals/generate (uses GeminiService)
- Save proposal: POST /api/proposals (creates voyage with expense, itineraries and flights)
- Voyage CRUD: /api/voyages endpoints
- Flights: GET/POST /api/voyages/{id}/flights, GET/DELETE /api/flights/{id}

exec: // AI generation can take longer, allow up to 30 seconds
pm.test("Response time is less than 30000ms", function () {

pm.test("Proposals are reasonably within budget", function () {
